title: Height Clue
clueText: The missing item was disturbed at a telling height.
endExplanation: The culprit's height matched the way the item was handled.

title: Track Clue
clueText: The tracks showed a telling depth.
endExplanation: The culprit's weight matched the track depth.

title: Residue Clue
clueText: There was a type-specific trace left behind.
endExplanation: The culprit left residue that matched its type.

title: Ground Clue
clueText: The nearby ground showed a telling trace.
endExplanation: The culprit disturbed the ground in a way that matched its type.

title: Entry Clue
clueText: The point of entry showed a telling mark.
endExplanation: The culprit left a mark that matched how it forced entry.

title: Witness Clue
clueText: A witness remembered a telling detail.
endExplanation: The witness detail matched the culprit.

title: Strength Clue
clueText: The scene showed what the culprit relied on most.
endExplanation: The culprit's strongest quality matched the clue.

title: Limitation Clue
clueText: The route showed what the culprit avoided.
endExplanation: The culprit's weakest quality matched the clue.
